title: outbox handler calls query.page.unwrap_or(1) after already confirming page.is_some()
description: In outbox() (server.rs ~line 519): the code checks 'if query.page.is_none() { return early }' and then on the next line calls 'let page = query.page.unwrap_or(1).max(1)'. After the is_none early return, query.page is guaranteed Some, so the .unwrap_or(1) is dead code and misleads readers into thinking page could still be None at that point. Use query.page.expect("checked above") or restructure as a match to make the invariant explicit.
close_reason: False positive: unwrap_or(1) handles absent page param, .max(1) handles page=0. Both are needed.
